headline: Hannah Berner Transforms Reality TV Drama into Comedy Gold with Hulu Special
lede: Comedian Hannah Berner breaks through her reality TV constraints with a searingly honest Hulu stand-up special that reclaims her narrative and comedic voice.
body:
Hannah Berner is rewriting her entertainment industry playbook, transforming from reality show personality to stand-up comedy powerhouse with her latest Hulu special, *None of My Business*.

After years of feeling silenced by reality television's restrictive formats, Berner discovered stand-up comedy as a liberating medium for authentic self-expression. Her Hulu special represents more than just a comedy performance — it's a personal manifesto of reclaimed agency and unfiltered storytelling.

The comedian's journey from *Summer House* participant to respected stand-up artist reflects a strategic pivot that many reality stars only dream of executing. Berner's material deftly navigates personal revelations and sharp social observations, demonstrating a comedic range that transcends her previous televisual typecast.

Her comedic approach interweaves personal vulnerability with razor-sharp wit, creating a narrative that feels simultaneously intimate and universally resonant. By transforming her reality TV experiences into comedic fodder, Berner has effectively turned potential professional limitations into her greatest creative strength.

Stand-up comedy has become more than a career transition for Berner — it's been a healing process of professional and personal redefinition.
key_facts: Hulu special titled 'None of My Business'
Transitioned from reality TV to stand-up comedy
Uses comedy as a form of personal reclamation
